metadata.title: FocusNow — See Where Your Time Goes | Free Desktop Tracker
metadata.description: Free desktop app that tracks your apps automatically and shows where your workday goes. No screenshots, no keylogging. Mac & Windows.
metadata.keywords: focus tracking app, automatic time tracking desktop, app usage tracker mac, deep work tracker, productivity, pomodoro

hero.title: Where Does Your Day Actually Go?
hero.description: FocusNow quietly tracks your apps and shows you exactly how you spend your workday. See your most productive hours, spot time sinks, and build better habits — automatically.

tracking.title: Automatic tracking
tracking.description: No timers to start, nothing to log. Install it once and your real workday appears on the dashboard.

sessions.title: Focus sessions
sessions.description: Pomodoro (25 min) or Deep Work (90 min) — each session ends with a focus score, so you know if the time was really yours.

report.title: AI Daily Report
report.description: At the end of the day, AI sums up what went well, where the time leaked, and what to try tomorrow.

privacy.title: Private by design
privacy.description: No screenshots, no keystrokes — and you decide what counts as a distraction.

meta.title: Download FocusNow Free — Mac & Windows
meta.description: Download FocusNow for free. Automatic focus and time tracking for macOS and Windows. Installs in under a minute.

download.title: Download FocusNow
download.description: Free forever. Installs in under a minute.

mac.title: macOS
items: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
Apple Silicon or Intel
500 MB disk space

windows.title: Windows
items: Windows 10 or later
64-bit processor
500 MB disk space

permissions.title: Grant Permissions
permissions.description: Sign in with Google or Microsoft, then grant accessibility permission so FocusNow can see which app is in the foreground. It only reads the app name, window title, and for browsers the page address — never your screen contents or keystrokes.

run.title: Let It Run
run.description: FocusNow works silently in the background. Go about your normal workday.

dashboard.title: Check Your Dashboard
dashboard.description: Open FocusNow anytime to see your focus stats, top apps, and productivity trends.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes — free forever, no credit card. A paid Pro tier may arrive later with team features and advanced extras, but everything you see today stays free.

items.question: Is this employee monitoring software?
items.answer: No — the opposite. FocusNow is a personal tool: your data lives in your own account and nobody else can see it. It never takes screenshots and never records keystrokes.

items.question: What data does FocusNow collect?
items.answer: Only what your analytics need: the name of the app in front, its window title, the page address in browsers, and how long you spent there. Everything is encrypted in transit and at rest, and never sold or shared.

items.question: Can I export or delete my data?
items.answer: Yes. Settings → Account gives you a one-click export of all your data as a JSON file, and you can delete your account — with everything in it — whenever you want.

items.question: How much CPU and battery does it use?
items.answer: Barely any. FocusNow checks the active window at regular intervals and sits quietly in the background — you won't notice it's running.

meta.title: Pricing — FocusNow Is Free Forever
meta.description: FocusNow is free to use with no credit card required. AI-powered activity tracking, focus sessions, analytics, and encrypted sync included.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent
pricing.description: FocusNow is free to use. We believe productivity tools should be accessible to everyone.

free.title: Free
free.description: Everything you need to track and improve your focus.
features: Automatic activity tracking with AI categorization
AI Daily Report — your day summed up by AI
Custom categories, app rules & exclusion lists
Encrypted cloud sync with offline mode

meta.title: About FocusNow — Our Mission
meta.description: FocusNow was born from a simple idea: understand your productivity without giving up your privacy. Learn about our mission.

about.title: About
about.mission: Deep work shouldn't require deep effort.
about.description: FocusNow was born from a simple idea: you should be able to understand your productivity without giving up your privacy. Most tools either lack depth or compromise your data. We thought there had to be a better way.

privacy.title: Privacy-First
privacy.content: Your productivity data is deeply personal. Everything is encrypted in transit and at rest, never sold, and stored on your terms. We built FocusNow so you never have to choose between insight and privacy.

simplicity.title: Effortless
simplicity.content: No buttons to press, no timers to start. FocusNow runs silently in the background and shows you where your time went. Productivity tracking that gets out of your way.

transparency.title: Transparent
transparency.content: We're clear about what we collect, how we store it, and why. No dark patterns, no hidden data flows. You own your data and can export or delete it anytime.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: FocusNow ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy covers the FocusNow website and desktop application. It explains exactly what data we collect, how we use and store it, who processes it on our behalf, and the rights you have over your personal information. This version replaces the version dated May 25, 2025.

trustPromise.title: 1. Our Privacy Promise
trustPromise.content: At FocusNow, we believe your productivity data is deeply personal. Before anything else, here is our commitment to you:
items: We never sell, rent, or trade your personal data
We never share your activity data with advertisers or data brokers
We never take screenshots of your screen
We never record keystrokes, mouse clicks, or form inputs
We never use your data for advertising or marketing profiling
You can delete your activity history and sessions from within the app at any time — and delete your account entirely, whenever you want, from Settings → Account

dataController.title: 2. Data Controller
dataController.content: FocusNow is developed and operated by Barbaros Zongur, based in Turkey. As the data controller, we decide how and why your personal data is processed. For all privacy-related inquiries, you can reach us at info@focusnow.ai.

collection.title: 3. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect only the data needed to provide you with productivity insights. Here is exactly what we collect and why:
items: Account information — your email address, display name, and which sign-in provider you used (Google or Microsoft). We never receive or store passwords
Optional profile details — your job title and sector, if you choose to provide them, to make your insights more relevant

Activity data — the names and file paths of the applications you use, window titles, the web addresses (URLs) you visit, whether you are active, idle, or away, timestamps and durations, and your focus session details. This powers your productivity analytics

Optional diagnostics and usage analytics — operating system and app version, device architecture, language and theme settings, anonymized usage events, and error reports. Collected only if you opt in (see section 7)
Website data — what the focusnow.ai website collects is described in the cookies section below

tracking.title: 4. How Activity Tracking Works
tracking.content: While it is running, the desktop app checks which window is in the foreground roughly every two seconds — including outside focus sessions. On macOS this requires the Accessibility permission, which you can revoke in System Settings at any time. You stay in control:
items: Your data is recorded on your device first, in a local database, and synced to the cloud while you are signed in
You can exclude specific applications and websites from tracking in Settings
You can delete individual activity logs and sessions from within the app — deletion removes them from both the cloud and your device
Quitting the app stops all tracking immediately

usage.title: 5. How We Use Your Data
usage.content: We use your data exclusively to provide and improve the FocusNow experience:
items: Categorize your activity automatically and build your analytics dashboards
Sync your data so your productivity history follows your account
Generate personalized focus insights and daily reports
Send service-related communications (updates, security alerts)
Diagnose technical issues and improve app performance (opt-in analytics only)
usage.note: We do not use your activity data for advertising, marketing profiling, or any purpose unrelated to the FocusNow service.

aiInsights.title: 6. AI-Generated Insights
aiInsights.content: When you request a daily report, that day's activity records — application names, window titles, URLs, timestamps, and categories — are processed by Azure OpenAI Service running inside our own Microsoft Azure subscription in the European Union. Your data is not used to train AI models. The generated report is stored in your account so it does not have to be regenerated.
aiInsights.note: AI-generated insights are informational only and can be inaccurate. They are not professional, medical, or employment advice.

analytics.title: 7. Optional Analytics and Diagnostics (Opt-In)
analytics.content: The desktop app asks for your consent on first launch before sending any analytics or diagnostics. If you decline, nothing is sent. If you opt in:
items: Error and diagnostic reports are sent to Azure Application Insights so we can find and fix bugs
Product usage events (for example, which features are used) are sent to PostHog, hosted in the European Union, under a random anonymous identifier — not your name or email
Session replay captures how the FocusNow app's own interface is used, with all text inputs masked. It never records your screen, other applications, or their content
Your job title and sector are never included in analytics data
analytics.note: You can change your choice at any time in Settings → Privacy. Turning analytics off stops all collection immediately.

storage.title: 8. Data Storage and Infrastructure
storage.content: Your synced data is stored in Microsoft Azure (Cosmos DB) in European Union data centers:
items: Encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and encrypted at rest using AES-256
Azure compliance certifications: SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001, GDPR-ready infrastructure
Physical and logical access controls at all data centers
A local copy of your data is kept on your device for offline access; the local database file name does not contain your email address in readable form

internationalTransfers.title: 9. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: FocusNow is operated from Turkey, and your data is processed in Microsoft Azure data centers located in the European Union. Where data is transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA) or Turkey, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and equivalent safeguards recognized by applicable data protection authorities. Our processors handle data under data processing agreements that include these safeguards.

security.title: 10. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
items: TLS 1.2+ encryption for all data in transit; AES-256 encryption at rest in the cloud
Sign-in is handled entirely by Google and Microsoft — we never see or store passwords
Sign-in tokens are stored encrypted on your device
Every API request is authenticated, and your data is isolated per account
security.note: No system is 100% secure. We take reasonable and appropriate measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

sharing.title: 11. Data Sharing and Third Parties
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. Data is shared only with the service providers below, and only to operate FocusNow:
items: Microsoft Azure — hosts our backend, database, and AI processing in EU data centers under a Data Processing Agreement
PostHog (EU-hosted) — receives opt-in, pseudonymized product analytics and session replay (see section 7)
Google and Microsoft — handle sign-in to your account; your login is processed under their own privacy policies. With your consent, Google Analytics also runs on our website
GitHub — distributes app downloads and automatic updates; when the app checks for updates, GitHub receives standard technical data such as your IP address
Legal requirements — when required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request
Business transfers — in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your data may be transferred as part of that transaction, with advance notice to you

cookies.title: 12. Cookies and Website Analytics
items: Essential cookies — required for basic site functionality
Google Analytics — runs only if you accept it via the cookie banner (analytics are off by default) and shows us aggregate information such as pages visited, traffic sources, and countries
No advertising cookies, ad trackers, or social media pixels
cookies.note: You can decline or withdraw cookie consent at any time. Desktop app analytics are separate and controlled in the app's settings (see section 7).

retention.title: 13. Data Retention
retention.content: We keep your data only as long as necessary:
items: Activity logs, focus sessions, and AI daily insight reports are retained in the cloud for up to 12 months on a rolling basis, then automatically deleted; your account and profile information are kept for as long as your account stays active
On your device, synced activity older than 90 days is automatically cleaned up; your cloud history remains available within the 12-month cloud retention window described above
When you delete data in the app, it is removed from both the cloud and your device
Account deletion requests are completed within 30 days; certain data may be retained longer where required by applicable law
Aggregated, anonymous statistics that cannot identify you may be retained for service improvement

rights.title: 14. Your Rights (GDPR & KVKK)
rights.content: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), Turkey's Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK), and similar laws, you have the right to:
items: Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
Rectification — request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
Erasure — request deletion of your account and all associated data
Data portability — request an export of your data in a machine-readable format
Restriction — request that we limit processing of your data
Objection — object to processing based on legitimate interest
Withdrawal of consent — withdraw consent for optional processing (such as analytics) at any time in the app or on the website
Complaint — lodge a complaint with your data protection authority (in Turkey, the Personal Data Protection Authority; in the EEA, your national authority)
rights.note: You can export your data and delete your account directly in the app (Settings → Account). For everything else, email info@focusnow.ai — we respond within 30 days.

children.title: 15. Children's Privacy
children.content: FocusNow is not intended for use by children under the age of 13 (or the applicable minimum age in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

changes.title: 16. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. When we make material changes, we will notify you through the app or via email before the changes take effect. Your continued use of FocusNow after the changes become effective constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 17. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights:
items: Email: info@focusnow.ai
Response time: within 30 days of receiving your request
contact.note: Data Controller: FocusNow — Barbaros Zongur, Turkey. This policy is provided in English and Turkish; if the two versions conflict, the English version prevails.

meta.title: Terms of Use — FocusNow
meta.description: The terms that apply when you use the FocusNow desktop app and website: license, acceptable use, AI content, warranties, and liability.

termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.intro: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your use of the FocusNow desktop application and the focusnow.ai website (together, the "Service"), operated by Barbaros Zongur, based in Turkey ("we", "our", or "us"). By downloading, installing, signing in to, or using the Service, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

service.title: 1. The Service
service.content: FocusNow is a productivity tracking tool. The desktop app records which applications and windows you use on your own device, organizes that activity into sessions and analytics, and can generate AI-assisted daily reports. Some features require an account and an internet connection; activity tracking runs locally on your device.

license.title: 2. License
license.content: We grant you a personal, limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to install and use the FocusNow desktop application on devices you own or control, for your own use. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, rent, sublicense, reverse engineer, or attempt to extract the source code of the Service, except where such a restriction is prohibited by law.

accounts.title: 3. Your Account
accounts.content: You sign in to FocusNow with a Google or Microsoft account. You are responsible for keeping access to that account secure and for all activity that happens under it. You must provide accurate information and be legally capable of entering into these Terms. FocusNow is not intended for children under 13 (or the applicable minimum age in your jurisdiction).

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
items: Use the Service to monitor another person or their device without their knowledge and lawful consent — FocusNow is a self-tracking tool, not an employee or family surveillance product
Interfere with, disrupt, or attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, its infrastructure, or other users' data
Use the Service in violation of applicable laws or regulations
Resell, redistribute, or offer the Service to third parties as your own product
Circumvent or attempt to circumvent technical limitations or security measures of the Service

plans.title: 5. Free Plan and Future Paid Plans
plans.content: FocusNow is currently free to use. We may introduce paid plans with additional features in the future; if we do, pricing and terms for those plans will be communicated clearly before you are charged anything. We may also change, limit, or discontinue features of the free plan, with reasonable notice where the change is material.

aiContent.title: 6. AI-Generated Content
aiContent.content: Daily reports and insights are generated by artificial intelligence based on your activity data. AI output can be incomplete, inaccurate, or misleading. Insights are provided for your personal information only and do not constitute professional, medical, legal, or employment advice. You should not make significant decisions based solely on AI-generated content.

privacyRef.title: 7. Privacy
privacyRef.content: Our Privacy Policy explains what data we collect and how we handle it, and forms part of these Terms. By using the Service, you acknowledge the Privacy Policy at focusnow.ai/privacy.

updates.title: 8. Updates and Availability
updates.content: The desktop app may download and install updates automatically to keep the Service secure and functional. We aim to keep the Service available but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation, and we may suspend the Service for maintenance. Cloud sync and AI features depend on third-party infrastructure and may be temporarily unavailable.

ip.title: 9. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Service, including its software, design, branding, and content (excluding your data), is owned by us and protected by intellectual property laws. These Terms do not grant you any rights to our trademarks or branding. You retain all rights to your own activity data; you grant us only the rights needed to operate the Service for you, as described in the Privacy Policy.

warranty.title: 10. Disclaimer of Warranties
warranty.content: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that the Service will be accurate, reliable, uninterrupted, or error-free, or that activity data will never be lost. Keep your own backups of anything critical.

liability.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for lost profits, lost data, or business interruption, arising from your use of or inability to use the Service. To the extent permitted by law, our total liability for all claims relating to the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us for the Service in the twelve months before the claim (or 50 USD if you have paid nothing). Nothing in these Terms excludes liability that cannot be excluded by law, including mandatory consumer rights in your country of residence.

termination.title: 12. Termination
termination.content: You may stop using the Service at any time and may request deletion of your account as described in the Privacy Policy. We may suspend or terminate your access if you materially breach these Terms, if required by law, or if we discontinue the Service; where reasonably possible, we will give you advance notice so you can export your data.

law.title: 13. Governing Law
law.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey, and the courts of Turkey have jurisdiction over disputes arising from them. If you are a consumer in the European Union or elsewhere, you also benefit from any mandatory protections of the law of your country of residence, and this clause does not deprive you of them.

changes.title: 14. Changes to These Terms
changes.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify you through the app or the website before the changes take effect. Your continued use of the Service after the changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

contact.title: 15. Contact
contact.content: Questions about these Terms: info@focusnow.ai. Operator: FocusNow — Barbaros Zongur, Turkey. These Terms are provided in English and Turkish; if the two versions conflict, the English version prevails.

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Remote Workers
meta.description: See if remote work is actually working for you. Track your focus, find your productive hours, and build better work-from-home habits.

remoteWorkers.title: See If Remote Work Is
remoteWorkers.description: Working from home means more freedom — and more distractions. FocusNow shows you exactly how your remote workday looks, so you can make it better.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: You feel busy all day but can't point to what you accomplished
Home distractions eat into your deep work time without you realizing
You're not sure if you're more or less productive than in the office
Work bleeds into evenings because you lost focus during the day

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See your real productive hours vs. time lost to distractions
Find your peak focus times and protect them
Automatic idle and away detection keeps your stats honest — know when to stop
Build evidence that remote work works for you

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Students
meta.description: Track your study sessions and find where your time goes. Build better study habits with automatic focus tracking.

students.title: Where Do Your Study Hours
students.description: You sit down to study for 3 hours, but how much of that is actual focus? FocusNow tracks your screen time automatically so you can study smarter.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: You plan to study for hours but end up on social media
You don't know which subjects eat the most time
Exam season feels chaotic — you're never sure if you studied enough
You can't tell if your study methods are actually working

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See exactly how long you actually study vs. get distracted
Track which apps you use during study time
Run Pomodoro or Deep Work sessions to stay on task
Review weekly trends to improve your study habits

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Freelancers
meta.description: Know where every working hour goes. Automatic desktop tracking for freelancers — no timers, no manual logs.

freelancers.title: Know Exactly Where
freelancers.description: As a freelancer, your time is your income. FocusNow tracks your work automatically so you always know how you're spending it.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: You underestimate how long tasks take and underprice your work
Admin and communication eat hours you can't bill for
You switch between projects and lose track of time
End of month, you wonder where all your hours went

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See real time spent in each app — and group apps into custom categories
Identify unbillable time sinks like email and Slack
Track your most productive hours to schedule important work
Build data to price your services accurately

meta.title: Focus Tracker for Developers
meta.description: Track your coding time, code review hours, and meeting overhead. See your real development workflow.

developers.title: Is That Code Review Really
developers.description: Between coding, code reviews, meetings, and Slack, it's hard to know where your day actually goes. FocusNow shows you the real picture.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
items: Meetings and code reviews fragment your deep work time
You feel like you coded all day but shipped nothing
Context switching between PRs, Slack, and IDE kills your flow
You can't quantify how much time you spend in actual development

solution.title: How FocusNow Helps
items: See time in IDE vs. browser vs. communication tools
Track deep coding sessions and spot your peak hours on the hourly focus chart
Identify meeting overhead and context-switching costs
Build data to advocate for more focus time

analytics.label: Analytics

categories.label: Customization
